help.short: The name of the Job Definition resource.
The name of the Project resource.
The name of the Storage Mover resource.

json.schema:
<prop type="array" name="connections">
<prop type="array" name="daysOfMonth">
<prop type="array" name="daysOfWeek">
<prop readOnly="True" type="array" name="value">

command.name: delete
command.confirmation: Are you sure you want to perform this operation?

help.short: The name of the Job Definition resource.
The name of the Project resource.
The name of the Storage Mover resource.

command.name: create

help.short: The name of the Job Definition resource.
The name of the Project resource.
The name of the Storage Mover resource.

command.argGroup:
<arg type="array" var="$jobDefinition.properties.connections" options="connections" group="Properties">
<arg type="array" var="$jobDefinition.properties.schedule.daysOfMonth" options="days-of-month">
<arg type="array" var="$jobDefinition.properties.schedule.daysOfWeek" options="days-of-week">

json.schema:
<prop type="array" name="connections" arg="$jobDefinition.properties.connections">
<prop type="array" name="daysOfMonth" arg="$jobDefinition.properties.schedule.daysOfMonth">
<prop type="array" name="daysOfWeek" arg="$jobDefinition.properties.schedule.daysOfWeek">

<prop type="array" name="connections">
<prop type="array" name="daysOfMonth">
<prop type="array" name="daysOfWeek">
<prop readOnly="True" type="array" name="value">

command.name: update

help.short: The name of the Job Definition resource.
The name of the Project resource.
The name of the Storage Mover resource.

command.argGroup:
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$jobDefinition.properties.connections" options="connections" group="Properties">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$jobDefinition.properties.schedule.daysOfMonth" options="days-of-month">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$jobDefinition.properties.schedule.daysOfWeek" options="days-of-week">

json.schema:
<prop type="array" name="connections">
<prop type="array" name="daysOfMonth">
<prop type="array" name="daysOfWeek">
<prop readOnly="True" type="array" name="value">

<prop type="array" name="connections" arg="$jobDefinition.properties.connections">
<prop type="array" name="daysOfMonth" arg="$jobDefinition.properties.schedule.daysOfMonth">
<prop type="array" name="daysOfWeek" arg="$jobDefinition.properties.schedule.daysOfWeek">
